title: Weather: Morning fog with clouds in places
description: GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - While severe...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE | KAROO NEWS - While severe thunderstorms resulting in localised damage are expected in the Northern Cape today, the South African Weather Service has not issued any weather warnings for the Garden Route or Karoo.


> Regional weather forecast:


Western CapeMorning fog in places in the southern and western parts, otherwise partly cloudy and cool to warm, but fine in the interior with isolated showers and thundershowers over the north-eastern parts by the afternoon. The wind along the coast will be light to moderate southerly to south-easterly, but south-westerly along the south coast.

The expected UVB sunburn index: Low

Western half of the Eastern CapeFog in places south of escarpment at first otherwise partly cloudy and cool to warm with isolated afternoon and evening showers and thundershowers but scattered in the north. The wind along the coast will be light northerly, becoming light south-easterly in the afternoon.

Eastern half of the Eastern CapeFog in places south of escarpment at first, otherwise partly cloudy and cool to warm with isolated afternoon and evening showers and thundershowers. The wind along the coast will be light northerly, becoming light south-easterly in the afternoon.


> Expected temperatures on Thursday 28 August:



> Extended weather forecast:


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
